mapper.update:
UPDATE reservations
user_id = #{userId},
room_id = #{roomId},
title = #{title},
purpose = #{purpose},
start_time = #{startTime},
end_time = #{endTime},
attendees = #{attendees},
status = #{status},
remarks = #{remarks},
reviewer_id = #{reviewerId},
review_time = #{reviewTime},
review_remarks = #{reviewRemarks},
updated_at = #{updatedAt},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
sign_start_time = #{signStartTime},
sign_end_time = #{signEndTime},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT re.id, re.user_id, re.room_id, re.title, re.purpose, re.start_time, re.end_time, re.attendees, re.status, re.remarks, re.reviewer_id, re.review_time, re.review_remarks, re.created_at, re.sign_start_time, re.sign_end_time, re.updated_at,rooms.name as room_name FROM reservations re LEFT JOIN rooms on re.room_id = rooms.id where re.id = #{id}

SELECT re.id, re.user_id, re.room_id, re.title, re.purpose, re.start_time, re.end_time, re.attendees, re.status, re.remarks, re.reviewer_id, re.review_time, re.review_remarks, re.created_at, re.updated_at, re.sign_start_time, re.sign_end_time, rooms.name as room_name,u.username as username FROM reservations re LEFT JOIN rooms on re.room_id = rooms.id LEFT JOIN users u on re.user_id = u.id where re.status = 'approved' and re.end_time <= #{now} order by re.created_at desc

SELECT re.id, re.user_id, re.room_id, re.title, re.purpose, re.start_time, re.end_time, re.attendees, re.status, re.remarks, re.reviewer_id, re.review_time, re.review_remarks, re.created_at, re.updated_at, re.sign_start_time, re.sign_end_time, rooms.name as room_name,u.username as username FROM reservations re LEFT JOIN rooms on re.room_id = rooms.id LEFT JOIN users u on re.user_id = u.id WHERE re.status = 'approved' AND re.sign_start_time IS NULL AND TIMESTAMPADD(MINUTE, #{graceMinutes}, re.start_time) <= #{now} ORDER BY re.created_at DESC

SELECT re.id, re.user_id, re.room_id, re.title, re.purpose, re.start_time, re.end_time, re.attendees, re.status, re.remarks, re.reviewer_id, re.review_time, re.review_remarks, re.created_at, re.updated_at, re.sign_start_time, re.sign_end_time, rooms.name as room_name,u.username as username FROM reservations re LEFT JOIN rooms on re.room_id = rooms.id LEFT JOIN users u on re.user_id = u.id WHERE re.status = 'approved' AND re.sign_start_time IS NOT NULL AND re.end_time <= #{now} ORDER BY re.created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approvedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelledCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'occupied' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS occupiedCount FROM reservations WHERE user_id = #{userId}
